file_insights: Created comprehensive local data models for offline-first architecture: 3 files totaling 1,046 lines
local_trip_model.dart (318 lines): Wraps LocalTrip database entity with sync tracking, JSON serialization, entity conversion, validation methods, and helper getters
local_journal_model.dart (331 lines): Wraps LocalJournal database entity with similar features plus utility getters for content analysis
sync_operation_model.dart (397 lines): Handles sync queue operations with enums, state management, exponential backoff, and helper methods
offline_models.dart: Updated to export all three models for clean module organization
Updated auto-claude progress tracking files to mark subtask 2.5 as completed
patterns_discovered: Wrapper pattern for database entities with domain entity conversion
JSON serialization pattern with fromJson/toJson methods
Sync state tracking pattern with common fields (isSynced, hasPendingChanges, version, isDeleted, lastSyncedAt)
Validation pattern with constants and helper methods
CopyWith pattern for immutable data structures
Enum patterns for sync operation types, priorities, and statuses
State management pattern with helper getters for sync status (needsSync, isSyncing, etc.)
Exponential backoff pattern for retry logic
Human-readable description patterns for complex entities
gotchas_discovered: Complex state management for sync operations requiring multiple enum values
Proper handling of soft deletes vs hard deletes in offline context
Consistency between database entities and domain models
Validation complexity for multi-field entities with different data types
Sync operation lifecycle management (pending → processing → completed/failed)
Time-based operations for sync timestamps and backoff logic
Need for both fromDatabase() and toDomainEntity()/fromDomainEntity() conversion methods
Maintaining compatibility with existing project patterns from ProfileModel and UserModel

approach_outcome.approach_used: Created wrapper models for each database entity (LocalTrip, LocalJournal, SyncQueueItem) with comprehensive sync tracking, validation, JSON serialization, and entity conversion methods
approach_outcome.why_it_worked: Followed established project patterns from ProfileModel and UserModel, implemented comprehensive validation methods, added proper JSON serialization, included all required sync status fields, and created helper methods for common operations

recommendations: Add comprehensive unit tests for all three models to ensure data integrity and sync state management
Implement integration tests for model-to-database conversion flows

Add documentation examples for sync state management
Implement performance monitoring for JSON serialization/deserialization operations
